sections.heading: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: Superfowl Food Club, operated by Finfreed Club Pvt. Ltd., values the privacy and security of its users. This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, stored, and protected when users access or use the Superfowl Food Club application and related services.
By using the platform, users agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
paragraphs: Depending on platform usage and available services, we may collect the following types of information:

sub_sections.heading: b) Device & Technical Information
paragraphs: The application may automatically collect limited technical information such as:
after_points: For purposes including app functionality, security, performance improvement, and technical support.

sub_sections.heading: c) Location Information
paragraphs: Location-related information may be collected where required for service availability, operational regions, future ordering services, or user convenience features.

sub_sections.heading: d) Payment Information
paragraphs: Payments may be processed through authorized payment partners or payment gateways. Superfowl Food Club does not store complete card or sensitive banking details directly on its servers unless required by applicable systems or regulations.

sections.heading: How We Use Information?
paragraphs: Collected information may be used for:
points: Providing platform services and membership features

sections.heading: Membership & Service Communications
paragraphs: Users may receive communications related to:
after_points: Users may manage certain notification preferences within the application settings where available.

sections.heading: Information Sharing
paragraphs: User information may be shared only where reasonably necessary, including:
points: Legal or regulatory authorities where required by law
after_points: The company does not sell personal user information to unauthorized third parties.

sections.heading: Data Security
paragraphs: Reasonable technical, administrative, and security measures are implemented to help protect user information against unauthorized access, misuse, alteration, or disclosure.
However, no digital platform or transmission method can guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: Data Retention
paragraphs: User information may be retained for operational, legal, regulatory, security, and service-related purposes for a reasonable duration as required by applicable business or legal obligations.

sections.heading: User Responsibilities
paragraphs: Users are responsible for:
points: Securing their devices and login access
Notifying support regarding unauthorized account activity

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The application may use or integrate third-party services including analytics tools, payment providers, or communication services. Such services may operate under their own policies and terms.

sections.heading: Cookies & Analytics
paragraphs: Where applicable, the platform may use cookies, analytics technologies, or similar tools to improve application performance, user experience, and operational insights.

sections.heading: Children’s Privacy
paragraphs: The platform is not intended for individuals who are legally restricted from using such services under applicable laws or regulations. Users should access the platform only in accordance with applicable age and legal requirements.

sections.heading: Future Services
paragraphs: As Superfowl Food Club will introduce ordering, commerce, delivery, or related services in future versions, certain information practices may evolve accordingly. Updated policies will be made available where necessary.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
paragraphs: Finfreed Club Pvt. Ltd. reserves the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

sections.heading: Contact & Support
paragraphs: For privacy-related concerns, support requests, or policy questions, users may contact the official support channels provided within the application.
By using Superfowl Food Club, users acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to this Privacy Policy.
